subject: DevOps
title: Private Connectivity and VPNs
description: Learn Private Connectivity and VPNs in one minute.

hook.text: Your on-prem database must reach cloud services. Over the public internet? Too risky. Go private.

buildup.text: Site-to-site VPNs create encrypted tunnels between your data center and cloud VPC. Fully private.

discovery.text: Direct Connect, ExpressRoute, and Interconnect offer dedicated physical links with more bandwidth.

twist.text: VPN is quick but shares bandwidth. Dedicated links cost more yet guarantee speed and latency.

climax.text: Hybrid setups use both: dedicated link as primary, VPN as backup. Failover keeps you connected.

punchline.text: Connect on-prem to cloud privately. VPN or dedicated link.

quiz.question: What advantage does a dedicated cloud interconnect have over a VPN?
options: Guaranteed bandwidth and lower latency through a physical connection
It is always free of charge
